title: quercus calliprinos var. rigida
intro: Quercus calliprinos var. rigida, also known as the Cyprus scrub oak or Cyprus evergreen oak, is a variety of evergreen oak tree native to the eastern Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. Quercus calliprinos var. rigida is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to promote relaxation, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues.
